Playa Hermosa · Shore

Vamos a la Playa!

The beach at Playa Hermosa is steps from El Oasis — a documented shoreline on the Pacific coast of Guanacaste, where the dry-forest meets the sea.

Intertidal & Littoral Zone — Species Checklist
PDF

Playa Hermosa · Guanacaste. Barnacles, gastropods, bivalves, chitons, invertebrates, and macroalgae of the rocky intertidal zone, zoned from splash to subtidal. Seasonal notes for dry and wet season conditions. Based on Sibaja-Cordero & Cortés (2008), Revista de Biología Tropical, Bahía Salinas reference baseline.
